description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection wallet, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Product Details Cream wallet with a zipped main compartment Has a zipped separator and eight card slots and two slip pockets Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 10 cm Width: 18 cm Depth: 4 cm
